actions.script: var nativeSetter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;function setReactInput(el,val){nativeSetter.call(el,val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}async function typeInInput(el,text){el.focus();setReactInput(el,'');await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,300)});for(var c=0;c<text.length;c++){nativeSetter.call(el,text.substring(0,c+1));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,50+Math.random()*80)});}el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}function hasTurnstileIframe(){var iframes=document.querySelectorAll('iframe');for(var i=0;i<iframes.length;i++){if(iframes[i].src&&iframes[i].src.indexOf('challenges.cloudflare.com')!==-1)return true;}return false;}async function requestTurnstileFocus(){return new Promise(function(resolve){console.log('[Ahrefs] Requesting Turnstile focus from extension...');var timeout=setTimeout(function(){window.removeEventListener('message',handler);resolve({success:false,reason:'timeout'});},60000);function handler(event){if(event.source===window&&event.data&&event.data.type==='TURNSTILE_FOCUS_RESPONSE'){clearTimeout(timeout);window.removeEventListener('message',handler);console.log('[Ahrefs] Turnstile focus response:',event.data);resolve(event.data);}}window.addEventListener('message',handler);window.postMessage({type:'TURNSTILE_FOCUS_REQUEST'},'*');});}async function waitForTableRows(modal,maxWait){var startTime=Date.now();while(Date.now()-startTime<maxWait){var table=modal.querySelector('table');if(table){var rows=table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr');if(rows.length>0){console.log('[Ahrefs] Table loaded with '+rows.length+' rows');return true;}}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}console.log('[Ahrefs] Table wait timeout after '+maxWait+'ms');return false;}async function waitForModalWithFocusQueue(maxRetries,contentCheck){for(var attempt=0;attempt<maxRetries;attempt++){var modal=null;var startTime=Date.now();var turnstileCheckDelay=2000;var focusRequested=false;var modalTimeout=60000;await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,turnstileCheckDelay);});if(hasTurnstileIframe()&&!focusRequested){console.log('[Ahrefs] Turnstile detected, requesting focus queue...');focusRequested=true;var focusResult=await requestTurnstileFocus();console.log('[Ahrefs] Focus queue result:',focusResult);if(focusResult.reason==='modal_appeared'||focusResult.reason==='solved'||focusResult.reason==='no_turnstile'){modal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(modal&&modal.textContent.indexOf(contentCheck)!==-1){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}}}while(Date.now()-startTime<modalTimeout){modal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(modal&&modal.textContent.indexOf(contentCheck)!==-1){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}if(hasTurnstileIframe()&&!focusRequested&&Date.now()-startTime>5000){console.log('[Ahrefs] Late Turnstile detected, requesting focus queue...');focusRequested=true;var focusResult=await requestTurnstileFocus();console.log('[Ahrefs] Focus queue result:',focusResult);}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}if(modal&&modal.textContent.indexOf(contentCheck)!==-1){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}if(attempt<maxRetries-1){console.log('[Ahrefs] Modal timeout, refreshing page (attempt '+(attempt+1)+'/'+maxRetries+')');window.location.reload();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,5000);});var inputReady=false;var inputWaitStart=Date.now();while(Date.now()-inputWaitStart<15000){var inp=document.querySelector("input[type='text']")||document.querySelector("input[name='input']")||document.querySelector("input[placeholder]");if(inp){inputReady=true;break;}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}if(!inputReady){return{success:false,error:'input not found after refresh',attempts:attempt+1};}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000);});}}return{success:false,error:'modal timeout after '+maxRetries+' attempts',attempts:maxRetries};}function findMetricInSection(modal,labelText){var allEls=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('*'));for(var i=0;i<allEls.length;i++){var el=allEls[i];if(el.children.length===0&&el.textContent.trim()===labelText){var container=el.parentElement;for(var t=0;t<8;t++){if(!container||container===document.body)break;var candidates=[].slice.call(container.querySelectorAll('span')).filter(function(e){var txt=e.textContent.trim();if(txt===labelText)return false;if(e.children.length>1)return false;return /^[\d.,]+[KMB]?$/i.test(txt);});if(candidates.length>0){var value=candidates[0].textContent.trim();var dfEls=[].slice.call(container.querySelectorAll('p')).filter(function(p){return p.textContent.indexOf('dofollow')!==-1;});var dofollow=dfEls.length>0?dfEls[0].textContent.trim():null;var dfMatch=dofollow?dofollow.match(/(\d+)%/):null;return{value:value,dofollow_percentage:dfMatch?dfMatch[1]:null};}container=container.parentElement;}}}return{value:null,dofollow_percentage:null};}function extractTableRows(modal){var table=modal.querySelector('table');if(!table)return[];var rows=[].slice.call(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr'));return rows.map(function(tr){var tds=[].slice.call(tr.querySelectorAll('td'));if(tds.length<4)return null;var pageLinks=[].slice.call(tds[0].querySelectorAll('a'));var pageTitle=pageLinks.length>0?pageLinks[0].textContent.trim():tds[0].textContent.trim();var pageUrl=pageLinks.length>1?pageLinks[1].textContent.trim():(pageLinks.length>0?pageLinks[0].href:null);var intLinks=tds[1].textContent.trim();var extLinks=tds[2].textContent.trim();var anchorLinks=[].slice.call(tds[3].querySelectorAll('a'));var anchorText=anchorLinks.length>0?anchorLinks[0].textContent.trim():null;var brokenUrl=anchorLinks.length>0?anchorLinks[0].href:null;var statusSpans=[].slice.call(tds[3].querySelectorAll('span')).filter(function(s){return /^\d{3}$/.test(s.textContent.trim());});var statusCode=statusSpans.length>0?statusSpans[0].textContent.trim():null;return{referring_page_title:pageTitle,referring_page_url:pageUrl,internal_links:intLinks,external_links:extLinks,anchor_text:anchorText,broken_url:brokenUrl,http_status:statusCode};}).filter(function(r){return r!==null;});}var domainList='${domains}'.split(',').map(function(d){return d.trim()}).filter(function(d){return d.length>0});var allResults=[];for(var i=0;i<domainList.length;i++){var currentDomain=domainList[i];var input=document.querySelector("input[type='text']")||document.querySelector("input[name='input']")||document.querySelector("input[placeholder]");if(!input){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,error:'input not found'});continue;}await typeInInput(input,currentDomain);await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500)});var submitBtn=document.querySelector("button[type='submit']");if(!submitBtn){var allBtns=[].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('button'));submitBtn=allBtns.find(function(b){return b.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().indexOf('check broken')!==-1;});}if(submitBtn){submitBtn.focus();submitBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window}));submitBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window}));submitBtn.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window}));submitBtn.click();}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500)});var form=input.closest('form');if(form){form.dispatchEvent(new Event('submit',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true}));}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,300)});input.focus();input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keypress',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));var waitResult=await waitForModalWithFocusQueue(3,'Broken links on your site');if(!waitResult.success){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,error:waitResult.error,turnstile_retries:waitResult.attempts});continue;}var modal=waitResult.modal;console.log('[Ahrefs] Modal appeared, waiting for outbound table to load...');await waitForTableRows(modal,10000);await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000)});var onSite=findMetricInSection(modal,'Broken links on your site');var toSite=findMetricInSection(modal,'Broken links to your site');var outboundLinks=extractTableRows(modal);console.log('[Ahrefs] Extracted '+outboundLinks.length+' outbound links');var inboundLinks=[];var tabBtns=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('button')).filter(function(b){return b.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().indexOf('inbound')!==-1;});if(tabBtns.length>0){console.log('[Ahrefs] Clicking inbound tab...');tabBtns[0].click();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,1000)});await waitForTableRows(modal,10000);await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000)});inboundLinks=extractTableRows(modal);console.log('[Ahrefs] Extracted '+inboundLinks.length+' inbound links');}allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,broken_links_on_site:{value:onSite.value,dofollow_percentage:onSite.dofollow_percentage},broken_links_to_site:{value:toSite.value,dofollow_percentage:toSite.dofollow_percentage},broken_outbound_links:outboundLinks,broken_inbound_links:inboundLinks,turnstile_retries:waitResult.attempts});var closeBtn=modal.querySelector('button[class*="closeButton"]')||document.querySelector('button[class*="closeButton"]');if(!closeBtn){var svgClose=modal.querySelector('svg[class*="close"]')||modal.querySelector('[aria-label="Close"]');if(svgClose)closeBtn=svgClose.closest('button')||svgClose;}if(!closeBtn){var allCloseBtns=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('button'));closeBtn=allCloseBtns.find(function(b){return b.getAttribute('aria-label')==='Close'||b.textContent.trim()==='X'||b.textContent.trim()==='x'||b.textContent.trim()==='';});}if(closeBtn)closeBtn.click();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000)});var stillModal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(stillModal){var overlay=document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Overlay"]');if(overlay)overlay.click();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,1000)});}if(i<domainList.length-1){await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000)});}}return JSON.stringify({total_domains:domainList.length,results:allResults});
